title: Codex Architecture Verification
description: Execute a high-level audit of the OS scripts to ensure the Codex Gearbox is correctly routing and sanitizing data.

body.final_outcome:
The apprentice has generated the required deliverable
deliverables for the OS-V1 DataFlow Subsystem Audit, including a hypothesis
hypothesis document, detailed audit notes, an audit report, and a proposed 
automation script. The apprentice also documented their learning in the app
apprentice journal.
